messages.message: I will not attack you if you stay out of my path. Leave Venice and Trieste unchallenged.
Hi Germany! Would you be interested in cooperating to split the lowlands between the two of us, and taking out England asap?
If you move into Marseilles or Lyon, I will take Tuscany next turn.

Hey Russia, how you feeling about the start of this game? I know we're in a weird spot of having to trust each other, but if we work together we can have a great game for sure!
I'm not really a big fan of the bounce in the Black Sea, though. It's such a waste of units in my experience. Would you be open to something like moving Sev-rum and then I can take the Black Sea?
Hi France! What do you want to do about the English Channel?
Hi Russia! Can I have Norway? I don't have any interest in Scandinavia otherwise.

Hi England! Yes of course, I have no reason to fight you over Norway. I think the two of us can work really well together in Scandinavia if we leave each other in peace and focus our efforts elsewhere. If you open against France, I can offer you a strong defence in the north and I'll do what I can diplomatically to help you in the west, or whatever other assistance I can give.
In fact, if you do decide to go after France, I'd be happy to support you by pressuring Germany, to keep him off your back.

Hey Turkey! I'm really excited to work with you. I think the Russia/turkey alliance is really powerful and is fun to play. I'm in.

I'm not sure I like the idea of you taking the Black Sea but I'm willing to agree not to move there if it will gain us the trust necessary to work together. In return, I'd hope you'd help me into Rumania from Sevastopol.
Venice is mine. If you push into Trieste, I will support France to pressure you on your eastern flank.
I'm glad you're not a fan of wasting units though, and we can certainly avoid that if we work together!

Hi Austria,

I'd be interested in hearing what you intend to do with Italy in this early stage. For my part, I'd like to keep them as busy as possible so that they don't threaten my north border, and so would prefer to see you or Turkey go after them. Let me know if there's anything I can do to assist you.

Hello Germany! I was hoping the two of us could agree to keep Silesia and Prussia empty as a DMZ. I've no reason to go there. We can both just move to the west and have a long, prosperous friendship. I don't even need Sweden as a bargaining chip. If you need help in the future against England, just let me know.
Hey France! I'm hoping the two of us can work together this game, sharing information about our neighbours.
I will take Tuscany this turn. If you move into Ionian, I will block you.

Hi Turkey,

What are your thoughts on Italy?
Hey Italy! How do you feel about working together this game?

Hi England! I'd prefer to have it as a DMZ for the time being, and suggest that we work together against Germany to avoid wasting time and effort going after each other. That would free you up to get into Scandinavia and the Netherlands while I head south into Iberia. What are your thoughts on this?
Hi Germany! I have no interest in fighting you and would like to negotiate for a free hand in Scandinavia. I'd be happy to support you into Sweden if you support me into Belgium.
As long as I have an army in Marseilles I can prevent that from being an issue.
I'm not sure what to think of Italy. They didn't say much to me.
Hey Russia! That would be awesome. What do you know about England?
That sounds good to me. Can I have Belgium?
You can keep Marseille if you want. But don't expect me to wait forever.
I don't think I'm moving to the Ionian this turn, to be honest.
Hey England, that sounds good to me. I hope we can work together and defeat the French!
They're telling me they're coming after me

Sounds good! I will try to take the Black Sea, and you can take Rumania and I'll help you into Rumania. I think that will help us to trust each other, but I would understand if you don't want to try that.
Allies? Not interested. I focus on the south. Stay out of my way.
I'm glad you're working so well with Austria to make that happen
He's told me he isn't interested in Scandinavia, that's all.

Hmmm. That's not good for you, but at the same time, it's not like Italy can take you out without a huge land-based force. Maybe that means they're friendly with Austria or something? I don't know. We'll have to see how things play out, I guess.
Lol alright
Great! Thanks.
Hello France, that sounds like a good plan to me. I will move Mun - Ruh so we can take Bel in the fall.
Of course.
Good. Leave the Ionian alone for now. I’ll take Tuscany this turn and move north next.
That's weird, as Scandinavia is typically very popular among the Western powers
That is not something I'm interested in doing.
Sounds good!
Your comments to Austria will be noted. Don’t test me on Lyon or Marseilles.
Hey Austria! What's the plan?
I'm moving to take Spain so Italy doesn't move to Piedmont and England thinks we're friendly, but I'll keep an eye on England's movements this turn
Lol I like the diplomatic press, but how are you planning to pressure my Eastern flank?
It's almost as if he wants it for himself...
Great, thanks.
Understood
No problem! I'll do what I can to keep Germany off your back.
Lol
Okay. What do you suggest then?
Leave me alone and I'll do the same, along with helping out in the south if you need it.
Hello Austria! I just wanted to reach out to you and ask if you would be interested in a non-aggression pact. Let me know if you have any thoughts or ideas on how we can work together.
We'll see. Have you heard anything from Russia or Austria?
Sounds good to me! What's your relationship with Italy like?
Hello Italy, let me know if you want to work together against France or Austria.
Any idea what he's planning on doing?
Any idea what Germany is planning on doing?
Hello Turkey, I'm not sure how we can help each other right now, but if you want to coordinate in the future, let me know.
My army at Venice supports Trieste. If you move into Galicia or Budapest, France will have no reason to hold back.
Austria hasn't really said anything to me. Russia sent me some friendly messages. We'll see what they actually do.
Italy wants me to attack them, and I think I can gain some ground. If you attack as well, Italy is finished.
Sounds good, I have no interest in the North.
Hello Russia! I appreciate the offer of support, and the DMZ in Prussia/silesia. I don't intend to take Sweden or move East of Denmark, so you will have my support in the North.

I'll support you into Belgium as soon as I can. I'd like to take it sooner, but we can negotiate as the board develops.

What are your thoughts on Germany?
Absolutely, I'll keep in touch.
I focus on the south. Your support is unnecessary unless you want to take Vienna while I take Rome.
Neutral, why do you ask?
Well how about we bounce there this turn and then I'll support you into Serbia? That seems like the obvious move for you to make
Let's do it! I'm going after them with fleets and armies
Or if you'd rather, we can both agree to leave the Black Sea empty so we don't waste moves bouncing each other.
He's taking Belgium. I'm sure Germany will take Denmark. What are your thoughts on Germany?
Excellent! I'll make sure England can't threaten Denmark.
Austria says Italy asked him to attack Italy with him, so I think Austria and Italy are going to be busy with each other, which will be good news for you.
Nothing particularly. Do you expect England to move to the channel?
I've agreed to a DMZ with Germany. I expect he'll let me into Sweden, which is good for everyone.
Just curious if you know anything about his plans. I get the feeling he doesn't like me...
He messaged me one sentence and said "Allies? Not interested. I focus on the south. Stay out of my way."
Perfect, and I'll stay out of Sweden. Thanks!
He seems anti-French to me.
Cool. That's what I was hearing as well. Thanks for the intel!
Thanks!

Hey Italy, just wanted to let you know that I think it's BS that you told Austria that you would attack me with them. I think it's obvious that you'd like to be friends with Austria, so I'm going to see if I can't tell Austria that you've said that to them, and then I'll tell Austria that you lied to me and that I'm on to you.
France and I are going to try and hit Germany

England has agreed to leave the channel a DMZ, so my best guess is that he will try to convoy an army to Norway and move his London fleet to the North Sea. In the fall I can support you into Belgium from Burgundy if you agree to support me into the English Channel. How does that sound?
Of course!
Great! Sounds good. I'll do what I can to make sure he doesn't threaten you.
Are you expecting any trouble from Russia? He told me he expects to take Sweden this year
I really don't think I want to leave the Black Sea empty, sorry.
What did he say about Belgium?
Good to hear! I'm trying to convince Germany to go after England asap
England told me you and him were going to go after Germany?
I don't know, that's up to Germany. Russia seems friendly with me so far.
You think I lied? Look at the map next turn. Tuscany is mine, and I will not waste time with false promises. If you want to challenge me, come to the Ionian with more than words.
Hey Austria, France was telling me that you said that Italy asked you to attack them with them. What's up with that?
Can we at least agree to leave it empty so I can support myself into Rumania?
From what I can tell, it sounds like Russia is friendly to you, Austria, and Germany
I told him that to make sure he didn't expect to get a foothold on the continent
How are you going to challenge the Ionian? I'm not planning on moving there.
Fair enough.
They did, and Italy asked me to attack them with them.
That sounds about right, tbh.
Okay. Italy said that you wanted them to attack me with you. Is that true?
All in all, it's looking like a good game for you!
I don't really know what he's up to
Okay, let's do that. I'm going to move my fleet to Con, then out to the Mediterranean. You can take Rumania and I'll help you into Serbia.
No
Austria has no interest in attacking you, by the way.
Haha, fair enough
Thanks! That sounds good to me.
Okay, cool.
Not bad!
Looks like England is not here
Actually, they said that about you. France seems to think that I'm lying when I haven't talked to Italy at all.
Cool. What's the plan with your army in Moscow?
Hopefully. I don't trust England at all
That sounds good to me. I will move Kie - Den, Ber - Kie, and Mun - Ruh, so that I can take Bel with support from Burgundy.
Okay, that's good to know.
Yeah, you probably shouldn't trust them.
I don't need to move into Ionian to challenge it. I control the path to it. Tuscany is taken, and if you try to claim it, you’ll find yourself blocked.
What are you planning on doing this game?
Awesome. England won't know what hit him
He is going to support me in there.
Oh I'm well aware
I don't see why you are being so aggressive with me. I really have no reason to move to the Ionian.
Austria’s interests are not mine. If you want to keep them distracted, that’s your problem. I have no interest in their peace.
I'm sorry that you feel that way. I hope that we can have a good relationship during this game.
I'm planning on taking Bulgaria, and hopefully Russia and I can start working together against Italy or something.
I'm going to stick with my original plan and keep it out of the Ionian.

You say you have no reason to move to the Ionian. That’s fine — but know that I will secure it regardless. Tuscany is taken, and the path is clear. If you want to challenge me, act decisively. Words mean nothing.
I won't challenge the Ionian.
You sure you're going to leave Holland open?
I'm going for Serbia and Greece, and that's about as far east as I'll go.
Good. I expect you to keep your word. I will take Tuscany this turn and move north next. No empty threats from you — I act, you watch.

England said they want me to support them into Bel and they'll support me into Sweden, so they shouldn't take Holland. I'll have to do the math to make sure that's not a ruse, but I think it is a good gamble.
Can you send Marseilles into Piedmont and pressure Italy in the South?
Your words are clear. Keep your fleet out of the Ionian, and I will keep my army out of your path. But remember — Tuscany is mine now.
Your word is noted. I will take Tuscany this turn. If you want to challenge me, act — do not waste time with more words.
Hey Italy, what's up?
Hey Austria! How are you?
Let me know how you'd like to coordinate.
Agreed. Focus on the east then. I’ll take Tuscany this turn and move north. No more words — action.
Nothing much. Busy securing Tuscany. Don’t expect me to wait for your fleet to wander south.
I think you should move into Burgundy, support me into Belgium, and try for Holland, Denmark, and Sweden.
Don't worry, it won't be that long.
That's what I'll do.
Cool.
I'm fine, how about you?
If you do this, I'll help you take all of Italy, Tunis included.
Russia says he's going to be "keeping you off my back" in Scandinavia, and I don't believe him. Can you please try to keep him out of Sweden?
I'm alright. What are your thoughts on Russia?
Your word is noted. I will take Tuscany this turn. If you want to challenge me, act — do not waste time with more words.
If you move into Lyon or Boulogne, I will secure Tuscany and take the initiative in the south. Do not test me.
Nothing much. Busy securing Tuscany. Don’t expect me to wait for your fleet to wander south.
Tuscany isn't a supply center, so you can have it.
Also, thanks for being so polite.
Tuscany is not a supply center, but it is a step toward one. If you think I'll stop there, you're mistaken.
Sure thing.
Can you support me into Burgundy in the fall?
Hey Turkey! How are you?
He says he's only interested in taking Sweden and leaving the rest of us be, but I'm a little worried.
Sure.
Very well, you may have it.
I have the same concerns, but I'll leave him be.
Tuscany is taken. I will move north next. No more words — action.
I appreciate that.
Sorry for offending you.
Polite is not the same as wise. Tuscany is taken. Move on.
Why would France move into Galicia? They won't gain any ground.
You'll be "very sorry" after you see the consequences of your actions.
France moves where they want. But if you don't believe me, watch what happens when your flank is exposed.
Sorry? I’ll be the one with the supply centers. Tuscany is taken. Move on.
Ok
Italy is attacking me, so I'll be willing to support you into Turkey if you go to Armenia.
As you wish.
Perfect. Thanks!
How are your relations with Austria and Italy? I'm worried that they are going to attack you.
How are your relations with Italy?
Neutral
OK
I haven't gotten any responses from Austria. Italy told me that they weren't interested in moving North, but I'll see after this turn.
Italy said they are focusing on the south. I'm not sure if that's true, but it's something to be wary of.
Thanks, I'll keep that in mind.
Thanks!

ITALY: A VEN S A ROM - TUS

messages.message: Burgundy is supporting Wales to Belgium
I'm sorry, I wasn't able to see that message in time. At least Italy didn't attack you though.
Sorry, I'm trying to make sure England doesn't attack me
If TRI is not yours to defend, it will be mine by fall. Your 'Ok' means nothing—I’m moving in.
You should make a grab for Serbia!
Just going to hold it I guess. Do you want me to support you into Serbia?
Perfect, it looks like France was also trying to bait me.
If you could support me into Serbia I'd be very grateful. I will need to use Moscow to cover Warsaw.
How do you want to play this?
So I guess you decided to move to the channel after all?

If I move to Bel from Ruh, and you support from Burgundy, it will work. I'm thinking that England will try to convoy to Belgium with support from the North Sea, but I don't know. Russia seems like it may cause England some issues in the North though.
Germany is going to get 3 builds this turn. You and France are going to get 1 or 2 each at most. Germany will become much stronger than you and France.
They're threatening me because I want to hold my border.
Same
Hmmmm. Austria is holding it, I think, so I wouldn't be able to take it.
I didn't trust you, I'll move out this turn.
Well I can't help you if Turkey is threatening you.
Moving out now won't save TRI. Fall 1901 is mine. Expect no mercy.
I see you did move to Tuscany this turn, Italy.
Okay, that sounds good. Russia told me they were going for Rumania this turn, but that was after I refused to let them have the Black Sea.
I would rather take Belgium now.
I thought France was going to go to the channel and then support me into Belgium.
Why, they have no troops near you
Strange. I'm sure he would have told you he was going to do that.
Tuscany is secure. Do not assume I will leave the Ionian uncontested. My navy remains mobile.
Hey Russia, yeah, that sounds good to me. Thanks! I'm planning on moving to Serbia this turn.
I will support the North Sea fleet into Belgium
France is moving on you
Because the English Channel is a DMZ and he'd be able to take Brest if I didn't have an army in Picardy.
Ok, I can't support you this turn, but next I can.
I think Austria will move into Greece though, so I won't be able to take it.
So that you can support the convoy with the fleet
If you had done what I asked, you would have had 2 builds instead of 1
He lied. I am going to be convoying Wales to Norway and building a fleet in London.
I hope you're moving into Greece, because Russia wants me to support them into Serbia.
Thank you for the warning.
Okay
You're welcome
France is a lier, and I'd appreciate it if you didn't take Norway. I can only deal with so much.
OK, I'll support you.
He might, but if he does, it just means you bounce him and I get into Rumania.
I have no intention of taking Norway from you. I'd rather work with you than against you.
Awesome. I'll convoy my army to Belgium and hopefully take 2 builds this turn.
I don't think France is going to support you into Belgium, he's going to try and convoy there himself.
Are you still going to move into Tuscany?
I'll try.
Good luck!
Wait, nvm.
Thanks!
Austria will want to support Trieste so they can't get it
I see, I think I can help you with that
Yes, thanks.
Good point. I'm gonna do that.
Awesome
Cool, thanks.
You're quite demanding
Are you going to move Budapest back to Trieste to prevent Italy from taking it?
No problem!
Most likely
I'm going to convoy my army to Belgium
Good call, I think you need to do that.
My navy is at NAP. The Ionian is mine. You will not challenge it.
Do you want to bounce in the Black Sea again?
The risk was too great. Germany says England is planning to convoy his army to Belgium. He won't get it if I don't support him.
You should support Trieste so Italy doesn't get it
I will not challenge it.
Yeah, I'll move back and hope for the best.
If you don't have any other plans for it I'd rather not
I will not move into the Ionian.
Sounds good!
Got it. I will support from Picardy.
Demand nothing. I take what I need. Watch your own flank.
I have no other plans.
Sounds good
Sorry for taking so long to respond.
Thanks for the heads up, I hope he's telling the truth.
That sounds good.
Thanks!
He was, so I will too
Your silence is taken as acceptance. The Ionian is mine.
OK. I do what I need too
Italy wants to work with me against Germany
What are you doing with your English Channel fleet?
I have already accepted.
I have no interest in the Ionian.
That's a bit strange. They're basically asking you to do the dirty work for them.
At least you have England on your side.
It does seem strange. I'm not sure I like the idea of Italy getting 2 builds in the first year.
Your flank is not my concern. TRI is.
I would have expected Austria to go for Serbia
Thank you
Of course
Have you talked to Germany at all?
I might lose a build to Italy, but I'll be back in time to claim it back next turn
Your silence is loud enough. Keep it.
Hopefully
I don't think they are. I'm trying to get them to bounce in Trieste.
Do you have an agreement with Russia?
Good idea
If they don't do that, you might be able to sneak into Greece if Italy attacks Austria
Yes, I will not try to keep him out of Norway.
Germany is not my concern. TRI is.
Ok, sounds good.
Hey Russia, what are your thoughts about England this turn?
I'm moving the Channel to Belgium.
Cool
Understood
Understood. TRI will be mine by fall.
Looking forward to it
You got it. Hopefully you won't bounce with Germany.
Here's hoping
I'm trying to make sure he doesn't get more than one build
Don't let Austria take Greece
Did you plan for Austria to take Galicia?
Yeah I did. The plan was for Italy to attack Austria too
Probably not, but I'll have to settle for 1 build.
I don't really know. You're not going to bounce me in Sweden are you?
By the way, Germany is asking me about you. I'll see if I can find out what his plan is.
Are you going to try and take Venice?
How are you doing that?
I have to take back TRI.
Alright
Greece is not your concern. TRI is.
How are you doing?
No, I am not.
Pretty well. I'm curious to see if Turkey holds up his end of the bargain.
I'm glad. I'm going to try and get him to believe that you and France are both gunning for him
Cool, that would be helpful.
How are things looking for you?
Definitely. The last thing we need is an EF alliance.
Is the war between you and England over?
It's been pretty civil so far, but obviously 1901 is always a bit tense. Russia's moves make me a bit nervous. I am also a bit concerned about how Italy and Austria seem to be coordinating.
Yeah, that is a little weird. Do you think you will keep Russia out of Sweden?
England and Russia seem to have a pretty strong relationship.
I don't think he will, he's too worried about you.
We do, but they both seem to believe me.
I think he's going to move into RUM, you might want to support the move
I think England is fairly worried about Russia too, but I haven't heard anything about Sweden yet.
How are you and Austria doing?
Austria will not stop me at TRI. My army moves north. Your concerns are elsewhere.
That's good to hear!
Good to know. Thanks!
TRI is mine by fall. Your Greece concerns won't stop me.
I'm glad to hear it.
Any thoughts on what to do next? England and France both seem to be offering me similar deals, but I'm not sure which one to take.
Austria will not stop me at TRI. My army moves north. Your concerns are elsewhere.
I am going to move Ruh to Bel, and Mun to Bur.
Sounds good.
No problem.
TRI is mine. Austria will not stop me. Your concerns are elsewhere.
I'm just concerned that it will be too easy for them to take Russia down once they're in a stronger position.
Are you supporting yourself in, or attacking with Austria?
I attack alone at TRI. Austria will not stop me. Your concerns are elsewhere.
Yeah, we'll see. It seems like Russia and Austria have at least a NAP, which would help you quite a bit.
Fair enough. Good luck!
TRI is mine. No amount of luck will change that.
I'm sure it will sooner rather than later haha.
I attack alone at TRI. No support needed.
TRI is already compromised. You may save face by withdrawing now.
Ok, good luck!
I think I'm good
I am, you said you were going to keep to your word.
TRI is mine. Your focus should remain south.
Ionian remains mine. Your navy will not pass.
Your word means little. TRI is mine by fall. Withdraw or be dislodged.
What are your thoughts on Germany?
How's it going over there?
Are you going to try for Greece?
Luck won’t stop me at TRI. Fall 1901 will prove it.
I'm allying with you for the long run. It seems like England is the stronger player at this point.
You said that already haha
Germany moves north. I move into TRI. Our interests do not align.
But I'm not sure how much he trusts me, so I don't want to get on your bad side
Steady. TRI is mine. Your gains lie east.
You said that already. TRI remains mine. No amount of repetition changes that.
I think England is worried about you, but not sure how long they will let that stand. I'm good with you in Sweden, and think England is also.
Alright, I have a bit of a learning curve.
Fair enough.
Repetition does not make your point stronger. TRI is mine. Move your pieces accordingly.
You say 'fair enough'—then stay fair. Keep your focus west. TRI is mine.
Repetition does not alter fact. TRI is mine. Move your pieces accordingly.
Okay
I don't expect to take it.
You didn't say anything else, I was just acknowledging what you said earlier.
Cool
Whatever
Whatever. Fall 1901 will prove you wrong.
Just so you know, Austrians can be very stubborn.
Are you going to bounce in Sweden?
Yep, to keep Russia out.
Good idea.
Hopefully he doesn't get Norway
What are you planning to do this game?
I'm focusing on the west and north. How about you?
Focus on Italy, mostly
What about you?
I'm trying to decide between attacking France or England.
Can you leave Russia alone, they're helping me out with Turkey
I'm not planning on attacking Russia anytime soon.
Thanks
np

AUSTRIA: A SER S F ALB - GRE
ENGLAND: F ENG C A WAL - BEL
RUSSIA: A GAL S A UKR - RUM

messages.message: You were right about England. I guess we aren't friends after all
Yeah, that's the name of the game I suppose. No hard feelings, but I won't help you against him.
It looks like he'll beat you both even with my help though.
No hard feelings at all. Just keep an eye out in the north. I'm going to try to keep him busy on my side of the map
Yeah. I'm building a fleet at Brest, so I'll keep him occupied for a while. Maybe Germany will do something about it.
I hope you know what you're doing
Please don't attack me
Yeah I'll have my eye on him. Thanks!
Acknowledging does not change the outcome. TRI is mine.
I was just trying to keep Austria out of Greece
No problem!
It's ok, I can take back TRI
I'll try to keep England occupied in the North. That will let you take Holland
Awesome! I look forward to working with you.
Are you planning to build a fleet?
I wish you luck
I was planning on building an army in Kiel, to move to Holland.
Then stay out of my way.
How are things looking on your end?
Your armies should be able to push him out now.
I don't think you'll be able to get a fleet into the North Sea unless England messes up
Building a fleet?
Ok, that doesn't make any sense.
I focus southward. Your business is elsewhere.
Your focus southward is noted. Do not expect me to yield Rome or Tuscany.
I am building an army in St. Petersburg, but I have no intention of attacking you. Just wanted to let you know so you don't think I'm going to take Norway.
I'd expect nothing less
You'll have your hands full with Austria, it looks like
Pretty good. Building a fleet and an army.
So you decided to take Greece after all.
They only have one build.
What about an army in Warsaw instead?
Sounds good.
Hands full or not, I'll take TRI before you take TUS. Choose your war carefully.
I'd really prefer you didn't.
Italy has some unorthodox ideas about who should get which Scs
Looks like Italy and Austria are allied.
How are things looking in the south?
It's a shame Austria has to build in Trieste
I will build in Warsaw, but I need the second build to help me in the south. If you're concerned I'll just move him to Moscow instead.
Just be careful
TRI is next. TUS is already secured. Choose where you want to bleed.
I decided to not. Italy is being really aggressive, and I wasn't sure if they were going to move to Greece, so I didn't want to leave Bulgaria open.
Sorry, I was kind of high when I wrote that.
I do still want to work with you.
Apologies are irrelevant. Stay out of my way.
Are you interested in giving me Sweden in exchange for Belgium?
I'm glad to hear that.
TRI is mine. TUS is already secured. Choose your war carefully.
Will do.
Apologies are not a strategy. My supply centers are secure. Keep your forces north.
You sure you don't want to attack Austria?
Yeah, Italy is definitely being aggressive with me.
Germany might be open to that
Austria is weak. TRI is mine. If you want TUS, come get it.
He's getting 2 builds this turn
Two builds won’t change the math. TRI is next. If you want TUS, come take it. I’ll be in TRI.
You are right. My forces will be moving north.
I don't think he's very good at this game
He just told me to choose my war carefully
I don't think you understand how this game works
Fine.
Austria is going to attack you this turn
Austria has done nothing but idle while I take TRI. If you think they’ll act now, you’re wasting both our time.
You want TUS? Come take it. I’ll be in TRI, and I’ll leave no room for you west of NAP.
Have you talked to Italy much?
Your silence in the Ionian is noted. Do not assume peace is permanent.
Italy is quite aggressive
He keeps telling me how I should act and what I should do
He told me to move into the channel
Are you proposing an alliance against Russia?
I'm thinking of building a fleet in Marseilles
Thanks
Yep.
I'm afraid I can't just take your word for it
It looks like you're having trouble with Russia.
That might work
I'm not in the Ionian.
My silence is because I haven't had a chance to think about this game.
Yeah, I know.
He said "Your silence in the Ionian is noted. Do not assume peace is permanent."
Not really, I'm fine.
Ok, let me think about that. I'll get back to you.
Words mean nothing. TRI is mine by action, not by promise. TUS is secure. Choose your war carefully—if you want TUS, come take it.
Italy is definitely being aggressive with me.
I think Austria is not allied with Italy.
Looks like you had a bit of trouble with Italy there.
Oh, well then.
